title: Treasury End of Day (EOD) Failing
symptoms: date not advancing in treasury module
checks: check batch job status in treasury interface
validate parameter [BRANCH=1] is set in job configuration
review job instance logs for specific errors
recommended_actions: ensure job parameter is set to [BRANCH=1]
do NOT skip jobs without IDC Support Team authorization
restart failed jobs from treasury interface
check interface services on servers 110 and 111
escalate to IDC Support Team immediately
notes: must run daily, including weekends and public holidays
never skip treasury eod jobs without authorization
